ℹ️
SM Total = Base + VAS OB + VAS PM + A2D + Incremental Bonus + Milestones — capped by Onboarding tier. Gate: vol ≥80% OR val ≥80%. Slab uses MAX(vol%,val%). A2D = OB disbursals (Mar) ÷ Total Mar approvals (full dataset). Onboarding cap: ≥3/FOS & ≥8 FOS→₹1.4L · ≥1/FOS & ≥5 FOS→₹70K · else→₹35K. 100%+ overrides cap. Zero disb = Zero total.
